subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1900
subcodes.first_line: The more you love, the nearer you will be to God. Love is one of the bounties of God. Therefore to love one another is good.
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @second birth, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion
